Privacy

Privacy Policy

Herbal Tea Bag Guide is designed as an informational website for cultural guides, tools, product research, and site improvement, advertising, affiliate links, contact forms, and digital product delivery.

Information we may collect

When the site is connected to analytics, advertising, affiliate links, forms, or paid products, it may collect basic usage data, referral information, device information, and information you voluntarily submit through a contact form or checkout flow.

We do not ask visitors to submit sensitive personal records for ordinary browsing. If a paid report or contact request asks for an email address or topic input, that information is used to process the request, provide support, and maintain order or delivery records.

How information is used

Information may be used to improve content, measure traffic, respond to messages, prevent abuse, process orders, deliver digital products, and understand which guides, tools, or product pages are useful to visitors.

Advertising and affiliate links

This site may display ads or include affiliate links. Affiliate links may earn a commission at no extra cost to the visitor. Advertising and affiliate partners may use cookies or similar technologies according to their own policies.

Data choices

Visitors can control cookies through their browser settings. Some analytics, advertising, affiliate, or checkout features may not work the same way if cookies or scripts are blocked. We aim to keep core reading pages accessible even when visitors only want informational content.

Contact

For privacy questions, contact guan@shanyuegroup.com.

Herbal Tea Bag Guide

Choose herbal tea bags by flavor, moment, and gift setting without medical claims.

Herbal Tea Bag Guide publishes practical guides, tools, resources, and FAQ for readers.
